title: Martcare
shortDescription: Polycarbonate visor & brow guard carrier. Elasticated adjustable headband. Adjustable tilt & engage mechanism
description: Polycarbonate visor & brow guard carrier. Elasticated adjustable headband. Adjustable tilt & engage mechanism

features: Provides protection against flying objects, particles, chemical splashes, splashes of molten metals & penetration of hot solids.
Compatible for use with half mask respiratory protective devices
